# Support

## Where to Ask Questions

- Open a GitHub Discussion (preferred for usage and design questions).
- Open a GitHub Issue for reproducible bugs and actionable feature requests.

## What to Include

Please include:

- Platform and compiler/toolchain
- Build preset or CMake flags
- Storage mode (RAM-only, POSIX, ESP32, adapter path)
- Minimal reproduction steps
- Expected behavior vs actual behavior
- Relevant logs or sanitizer output

## What Is Not Support Scope

- General C/C++ tutoring
- Non-reproducible reports without diagnostics
- Changes unrelated to `loxdb` core contracts

## Commercial / Priority Support

No formal SLA is currently provided in this repository.
